metadata.title: Allied intel & strategic-geography nodes — Australia, South Korea, Japan, Singapore, Hong Kong, Greenland & the Arctic
metadata.status: facts from major press / government / Snowden-corpus reporting; the 'physical chokepoints of information & compute' framing is labeled interpretation
metadata.frame: The allied side of the same chokepoint map: who physically controls the rails of INTELLIGENCE (signals/satellites), COMPUTE (HBM/chips), DATA (subsea cables), and the ARCTIC surveillance frontier. These are the nodes the AI-core (Nvidia stack), the Five-Eyes surveillance apparatus (spec-disclosures-surveillance, spec-telecom-satellite), and the materials chokepoint (defense_chokepoint) all run through. Overlay; excluded from the proofs. Pairs with geopolitics-contested-resource-states.

australia.signals_intel: PINE GAP (Alice Springs) controls US spy satellites covering ~1/3 of the globe incl. China, North Korea, Asian Russia and the Middle East; Snowden documents link it to Five-Eyes mass surveillance (ECHELON, XKEYSCORE) and to US strike targeting - reportedly including the 2026 Iran war via the bases. status: fact.
australia.aukus_materials: AUKUS: Australia paid the UK A$310M (Feb 2026) for SSN-AUKUS long-lead nuclear-propulsion items; plan = 3 US Virginia-class subs + 5 SSN-AUKUS; Trump pledged to accelerate. A US-Australia critical-minerals / heavy+light rare-earths FRAMEWORK (Oct 2025) ties sub delivery to mineral supply; Australia took ~45% of global REE exploration spend in 2024 (Lynas - see macro-critical-minerals-equities). status: fact.
australia.read: the keystone Five-Eyes signals node AND a rare-earth supplier - intelligence and materials in one ally; the bases also make Australia a co-belligerent surface.

south_korea.compute_chokepoint: SK Hynix + Samsung dominate HIGH-BANDWIDTH MEMORY (HBM) - the memory layer every AI accelerator needs; they supply HBM to Nvidia/Microsoft/Broadcom/Tesla. Korea's HBM position is 'the memory chokepoint' behind the entire AI stack. status: fact.
south_korea.strategic: Trump approved South Korea developing NUCLEAR SUBMARINES (Gyeongju summit, Pres. Lee Jae-myung) - a watershed that could pull Seoul (and its chip base) toward AUKUS supply chains; offset against the DPRK threat (TraderTraitor/Bybit in spec-unc-nk-attribution-map). status: fact + contested (AUKUS expansion).
south_korea.read: the single most important ALLIED compute chokepoint - if Korea's HBM stops, the Nvidia/hyperscaler build stops; a physical dependency the AI-capex core (fin-nvidia-openai) rarely prices.

japan.compute_chokepoint: The only US HBM producer (Micron, ~21% share) FABRICATES in Hiroshima and PACKAGES in Taichung, Taiwan - so even 'US' HBM runs through Japan + Taiwan. Japan also dominates chip MATERIALS and equipment (photoresists, etc.) and hosts TSMC Kumamoto + Rapidus. status: fact.
japan.capital: Japan is the yen-CARRY-TRADE source funding crowded global longs; the JGB escaping yield-curve-control (0% -> ~2.66% 2026) raises the carry cost (macro-carry-trades) - the 'BEAR' trigger in the scenario engine. SoftBank (fin-microsoft-openai/OpenAI/Stargate) is also here. status: fact.
japan.read: Japan sits on TWO chokepoints at once - the HBM/chip-materials supply chain AND the carry-trade funding rail; a shock to either transmits straight into the AI-core.

singapore.data_chokepoint: Singapore is the dominant SE-Asia SUBSEA-CABLE hub - ~28 cables landed + ~13 more planned - the 'Silk Road of the digital economy'; plus a top financial centre and AI-datacenter hub, holding studied neutrality between the US and China. status: fact.
singapore.read: whoever lands the cables sees/controls the data flow; Singapore is the allied-leaning chokepoint on Asia-Europe-US traffic - the civilian mirror of the telecom/CALEA surveillance rail (spec-telecom-satellite).

hong_kong.bifurcation: HK subsea-cable landing has STAGNATED since 2017 - Beijing's opaque licensing blocks non-Chinese vendors and routes new cables AWAY from HK / the South China Sea (e.g. SEA-H2X landed by China Mobile). Meanwhile HK is China's 'AI + Finance' testbed (PBoC's Lu Lei, HK FinTech Week 2025) and the #3 global AI-finance city hub. status: fact.
hong_kong.read: HK is being absorbed into China's network + financial stack - the live example of the internet BIFURCATING into US-leaning and China-leaning rails; ties to Ant's paused HKDA + PBoC (spec-exchanges-asia) and the digital-yuan/CBDC rail.

greenland_arctic.frontier: The Arctic is the new militarized surveillance frontier: NATO 'Arctic Sentry' (early 2026); Finland+Sweden accession gives NATO continuous Barents coastline; Russia rebuilt Kola Peninsula / Novaya Zemlya bases + a modernized submarine fleet; the Northern Sea Route's traffic grew ~40% (2013-25). Greenland's Pituffik + the GIUK gap are the Western early-warning chokepoints; China is a self-declared 'Near-Arctic State'. status: fact.
greenland_arctic.read: the Arctic fuses ALL the threads - materials (Greenland REE, geopolitics-contested-resource-states), military (subs, GIUK), intelligence (early-warning radar, undersea cables), and shipping (NSR). The northern chokepoint.

the_pattern: The allied map is a set of PHYSICAL chokepoints on the things the digital/AI economy runs on: SIGNALS (Pine Gap), COMPUTE (Korea/Japan HBM + Taiwan packaging), DATA (Singapore cables vs Hong Kong's bifurcation), and the ARCTIC frontier (Greenland/GIUK). The AI-core's '11-firm circular loop' assumes these stay open; every one is a single-point dependency outside the firms' control - the same lesson as the rare-earth/HALEU chokepoints, applied to information and compute. Intelligence dominance and compute dependence run through the SAME few allies.
